appraisal_events.evidence: « Elle a la plus grande situation dans le faubourg Saint‑Germain, elle a la première maison du faubourg Saint‑Germain. » Suivi d’une vision du salon comme temple soutenu par des « colonnes » aristocratiques.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator relays and amplifies the assertion of a social preeminence of the duchess, investing her salon and entourage with an aura of exclusivity that clearly enhances her position.

status_effects.explanation: The text places her at the summit of the Faubourg and describes her milieu as an elite space, which distinctly raises her local social stature.
